'''竏嗾-l-y-b''' ('''katalyeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrate|quadrate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-l-y-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrate|quadrate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏嗾-l-y-b
|-
! Lemma
| katalyeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thitalyeboko || jitalyeboko || shitalyeboko || kitalyeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthutalyeboko || jujutalyeboko || shushutalyeboko || kukutalyeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thutalyeboko || jutalyeboko || shutalyeboko || kutalyeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thutalyeboko || jutalyeboko || shutalyeboko || kutalyeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thetalyeboko || jetalyeboko || shetalyeboko || ketalyeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothotalyeboko || jojotalyeboko || shoshotalyeboko || kokotalyeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thotalyeboko || jotalyeboko || shotalyeboko || kotalyeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thotalyeboko || jotalyeboko || shotalyeboko || kotalyeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko || talyeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thﾃｦtalyeboko || jﾃｦtalyeboko || shﾃｦtalyeboko || kﾃｦtalyeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathatalyeboko || jajatalyeboko || shashatalyeboko || kakatalyeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thatalyeboko || jatalyeboko || shatalyeboko || katalyeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thatalyeboko || jatalyeboko || shatalyeboko || katalyeboko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || shatalyebithi || shatalyebiji || shatalyebishi || shatalyebiki
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || shatalyebﾃｦthﾃｦ || shatalyebﾃｦjﾃｦ || shatalyebﾃｦshﾃｦ || shatalyebﾃｦkﾃｦ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || shatalyebatha || shatalyebaja || shatalyebasha || shatalyebaka
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || shatalyebatha || shatalyebaja || shatalyebasha || shatalyebaka
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || shatalyebathaf || shatalyebajaf || shatalyebashaf || shatalyebakaf
|}
